---
name: Broken site report
about: Report a broken link, missing script, page issue, or validation failure
title: "Broken site issue: "
labels: bug, site-quality
---

## What is broken?

Describe the issue.

## Page or route

Paste the affected URL or route.

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Evidence

Add screenshots, logs, validation output, or steps to reproduce.

## Checks

- [ ] I checked whether this is an internal broken link.
- [ ] I checked whether the page has the required navigation or scripts.
- [ ] I checked whether the validator reports this issue.
